CustomField.description: As reported during the intake process, or on the application, in response to the question,"What is your ideal number of bedrooms?" Tip: This field can be used to better understand the market demand or match households to available units.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
As reported during the intake process, or on the application, in response to the question,"What is your ideal number of bedrooms?"
Tip: This field can be used to better understand the market demand or match households to available units.
CustomField.label: Number of Bedrooms Desired
